messages.author: maya
messages.text: I still think tenant checks belong in Postgres; putting them in the API means every new endpoint can forget one.

messages.author: liam
messages.text: Agreed, but RLS makes local debugging painful. Can we keep Supabase Auth for identity and let Postgres enforce tenant access?

messages.author: zoe
messages.text: Yes, lets do that for v1. The unresolved bit is how support impersonation gets audited.
